questionHtml:
The graph shows the variation with distance x of the displacement of the particles in a wave. The frequency of the wave is 600 Hz.


What is the speed of the wave?


A.  0.012 m s−1

B.  0.024 m s−1

C.  1.2 m s−1

D.  2.4 m s−1

meta.title: The graph shows the variation with distance x of the displacement of the particles in a wave. The frequency of the wave is 600 Hz. What is the speed of the wave? A. 0.012 m s−1 B.
